'''Blath''' was a tired [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] medic for [[Chay Praysh]] on [[Torpris]]. His duty was to ensure the health of the [[Drach'nam]]'s slaves toiling in the [[nutrient slime pit]]s in the bowels of [[Praysh's fortress]]. He was sympathetic, but nervous with the pressure of regularly incurring his employer's temper, working a job under the lens of a surveillance camera.
